reviews.comment:
Estuve ahí. Un desastre. La peor ACA que fui. Baños cerrados. Quisko cerrado. Estacionamiento cerrado y vallado. Soy socio y no me. Dejaron estacionaron por que el dueño tenía su auto y no quería que estacionen en su playa. Al menos eso dijeron los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
I was there. A disaster. The worst ACA I've been to. Bathrooms closed. A closed kiosk. Parking closed and fenced. I'm a member, but I don't. They let us park because the owner had his car and didn't want us to park on his beach. At least that's what the beachgoers said.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8139321778587704191/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcDVlSnJnRRAB
